{"LastUpdate":"2026-07-19 05:30 UTC","Overview":{"ReportDate":"13 July 2026","ReportTime":"8:43 AM","ReportAnnouncements":"","ReportWhatsHappening":"

Whether you’re hitting the slopes, exploring the village or enjoying tobogganing at Windy Corner with Everest Sports, there’s plenty to experience this week.

We have a great lineup of events and activations, including Twilight Tuesdays, Thursday night fireworks, live music and après experiences throughout the resort.

Planning to go tobogganing? Book your Windy Corner session with Everest Sports here

Discover what’s happening across the village. Explore the What’s On page HERE

overnight has resulted in some very nice grooming. Pretty Valley Road has been widened slightly and set with classic tracks down to the stockyards. McKay loop and Pretty Valley Road are looking great, the Nordic bowl has been flattened and fully groomed, and BHP road has been groomed from the Aqueduct to Pretty Valley Road. BHP road is looking very sad between the Aqueduct and Windy Corner. Low humidity all night has allowed for the snowmakers to have a crack at it. The snow has groomed up a treat and there should be some good turns to be had this morning. Things have remained firm off-piste all week, so expect similar conditions today. Slap on some sunscreen and ski and ride with care. Enjoy!
